title: The Scythe Mace
description: Would you want to slash your enemies with a brand new double-edged scythe? You would? Then this resource pack is just for you!
body:
Have you ever wanted to slash your enemies with a scythe in Minecraft? Well now you can with this resource pack! This resource pack only replaces the mace texture with a new double-edged scythe! The name is the same, so when searching in the creative menu, you won't have to deal with a new name!

***Be Warned: This resource pack still needs work, and is in beta! Changes will be implimented every now and then***
